thank_you.subject: Re: {subject}
thank_you.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your message. I have received it and will get back to you as soon as possible.

Best regards,
MailAgent

busy.subject: Re: {subject}
busy.body:
Hi,

I'm currently busy but I've seen your email. I'll respond properly when I have a moment.

Thanks,
MailAgent
